# Pull Request

## Agents and process
- [ ] Followed root `AGENTS.md` (OpenSpec for substantive work, pnpm-only installs)
- [ ] Updated `docs/operations/task-tracker.md` when execution status changed
- [ ] Appended to `docs/operations/logbook.md` for this change (or N/A with reason)
- [ ] Used parallel subagents where work was parallelizable (or N/A with reason)
- [ ] Called out Security/DevOps + Reviewer focus for auth, crypto, migrations, or notifications

## OpenSpec
- [ ] Change id: `...`
- [ ] OpenSpec files updated (`proposal.md`, `design.md`, `tasks.md`, relevant spec deltas)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria mapped to implementation

## What Changed
Describe the core behavior changes and why they are needed.

## Verification
- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Build

Commands/results:

## Risk and Rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Reviewer Focus
Call out areas needing deeper review (auth, crypto, migrations, notification logic, concurrency).
